creator: perky@fallin.lv
text:
one more. plz :)

diff -ruN jython/Makefile jython.2/Makefile
--- jython/Makefile	Sat Dec 22 21:43:09 2001
+++ jython.2/Makefile	Tue Jan  1 00:18:24 2002
@@ -14,7 +14,7 @@
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.class
 EXTRACT_ONLY=	# none
 
-MAINTAINER=	perky@python.or.kr
+MAINTAINER=	perky@fallin.lv
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${JAVA}:${PORTSDIR}/java/javavmwrapper
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${JAVA}:${PORTSDIR}/java/javavmwrapper
